word: G3711 - ὀργίλος - orgílos - org-ee'-los - Soon angry

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὀργίλος

- Transliteration: Orgilos

- Phonetic: org-ee'-los

- Definition:

1. prone to anger, irascible

- Origin: from G3709

- TDNT entry: 11:22,7

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G3709; irascible: - soon angry.
